steps.title: Use plural subject and possession
steps.content: The sentence needs a plain plural subject for the people who acted and a singular possessive noun to show that the official fossil belongs to Arizona.

steps.title: Reject apostrophe errors
steps.content: Choice A uses nonpossessive states; Choice C makes lawmaker's singular possessive; Choice D has both errors. The version with plural lawmakers and possessive state's fits. The answer is B.
